title: 2. FuKe (11.24) 针妇科穴
text:
Besides HuanChao and FuKe, HuoZhu, HuoYing and XingJian can also be used for this disease. In a severe case,
bloodletting can be performed along the area from medial malleolus and SanYinJiao (SP 6). Since the Liver
meridian runs through the lower abdomen and circles the pudendum, and the kidney opens into the Anterior
and Posterior Genitalia, diseases of the pudendum is often treated by treating the liver and kidney. Besides, since
diseases of the pudendum are often due to damp-heat, treatment is usually given to remove damp-heat.
